title: ‘Not for EU’ labelling in GB: Concordat between the UK, Scottish and Welsh governments
body: "The UK, Scottish and Welsh governments recognise the need to ensure the continuing supply of goods to Northern Ireland and agree to take action where required, in a timely manner, to ensure this objective is met.  This concordat outlines how the Scottish and Welsh governments will be consulted prior to the Secretary of State making a determination to activate the powers in the Marking of Retails Goods Regulations 2025. "
